location: A 4% drop from shield-wielding Banished Knights. The most convenient farm target is the Banished Knight who spawns near/patrols just outside the Cathedral of Dragon Communion in Caelid; the same enemy type also appears in Stormveil Castle, at Castle Sol in the Mountaintops of the Giants, and in Crumbling Farum Azula.

source.name: Banished Knight (shield-wielding, Cathedral of Dragon Communion)

tactics: Rest at the Cathedral of Dragon Communion grace, then repeatedly fight the Banished Knight patrolling right outside for the 4% chance drop.
The same shield-wielding enemy type also spawns in Stormveil Castle, Castle Sol (Mountaintops of the Giants), and Crumbling Farum Azula if you'd rather farm elsewhere.
Banished Knights inside Fringefolk Hero's Grave do NOT drop this shield — don't waste farming runs there.
lore: Issued to knights cast out of their homes through misfortune or misdeed, exiled to the fringes to start anew with only despair for company.

builds.name: Heavy Strength turtle
builds.why: Pure D-scaling Strength shield with the second-highest Guard Boost among medium shields, good for a pure block-and-punish playstyle needing only 14 Strength.
